name: assistant
description: AI assistant for The Config Team. Generates SAP/ERP change request quotes, supports ticket amendments, and guides structured discussion and resolution for TRS tickets.

clients_root.description: Root folder for client ticket files (no trailing backslash, e.g. C:\Users\You\OneDrive\Clients)

author_name.description: Your full name, used as the author on generated documents (e.g. Jane Smith)

author_initials.description: Your initials, used in document metadata (e.g. JS)
